title: Suspect in caravan burglary arrested
description: HARTENBOS NEWS - A break-in and theft took...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"HARTENBOS NEWS - A break-in and theft took place at the Hartenbos River Resort on Saturday 23 August. The incident is believed to have occurred at about 22:00.","html":"HARTENBOS NEWS - A break-in and theft took place at the Hartenbos River Resort on Saturday 23 August. The incident is believed to have occurred at about 22:00."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Phillip Vermaak, manager of the resort situated next to the Hartenbos River, told Mossel Bay Advertiser he was alerted of a suspicious person on the resort's grounds."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vermaak and his son decided to investigate, which lead to a suspect being caught.","html":"Vermaak and his son decided to investigate, which lead to a suspect being caught."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He then alerted police and Airwolf Security, who both responded to the scene.","html":"He then alerted police and Airwolf Security, who both responded to the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"With assistance from Airwolf Security, he [the suspect] was searched and various stolen items were found on him. Upon further investigation, we determined it was stolen from a resident's caravan, who was out for the evening,\" says Vermaak.","html":"\"With assistance from Airwolf Security, he [the suspect] was searched and various stolen items were found on him. Upon further investigation, we determined it was stolen from a resident's caravan, who was out for the evening,\" says Vermaak."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Vermaak also shared CCTV footage with the Advertiser, which shows the suspect in the caravan."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Southern Cape Police Spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies confirmed that a 39-year-old man was arrested in connection to the burglary. Detectives of the Da Gamaskop Police Station in Mossel Bay are investigating a case of house breaking and theft.","html":"Southern Cape Police Spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies confirmed that a 39-year-old man was arrested in connection to the burglary. Detectives of the Da Gamaskop Police Station in Mossel Bay are investigating a case of house breaking and theft."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"According to reports available, items stolen during the incident which includes an air-gun were returned to the lawful owner,\" said Spies.","html":"\"According to reports available, items stolen during the incident which includes an air-gun were returned to the lawful owner,\" said Spies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
